title: Swack
description: A Minecraft modpack that provides the best experience.
body:
![Swack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a95cce4b66339a556cfc9899bac6c5cd48e5512.png)

# Introduction

Swack aims to the best UX with awesome mods and config settings. As example, Krypton fixes problems of network. Zoom and other necessary mods are included. Our goal is providing a better user experience for everyone.


# How to use

Firstly, you need a launcher that must be support installing modpacks directly, e.g. Prism Launcher, ATLauncher. Then download the Swack and import on the launcher. That's it!


# About

I created this modpack because Minecraft has very optimization issues. I inspired by SO at doing this. This modpack fixes mostly bugs and optimization problems. Whole mods are open-source and written in Java. Currently supports 2 versions, but new versions will come in next days.
